intended_use: The Dreem 3S is intended for prescription use to measure, record, display, transmit and analyze the electrical activity of the brain to assess sleep in the home or healthcare environment. The Dreem 3S
intended_use_full: The Dreem 3S is intended for prescription use to measure, record, display, transmit and analyze the electrical activity of the brain to assess sleep in the home or healthcare environment. The Dreem 3S can also output a hypnogram of sleep scoring by 30-second epoch and summary of sleep metrics derived from this hypnogram. The Dreem 3S is used for the assessment of sleep on adult individuals (22 to 65 years old).
ground_truth: Expert manual scoring from AASM-compliant polysomnography recordings
other_metrics: Non-inferiority margins selected based on human variability estimated from comparison of expert scoring from 284 AASM-compliant polysomnography recordings; performance requirement is non-inferiority to all previously released versions of Dreem 3S
